_comment: JSON-LD FAQPage Schema — embed on pages with FAQ sections (pricing, help, product).
This schema enables FAQ rich results in Google: expandable Q&A directly in search results.
Each question appears as an accordion in the SERP, driving significant click-through.
When to use: Pricing page FAQ, help/support page, product page objection handling.
[CUSTOMIZE] Replace all question/answer pairs with your actual FAQ content.
Answers support basic HTML (links, lists, bold) for richer display.
Include 4-8 questions per page. Google may show 2-4 in search results.
Remove the _comment field before embedding in production.

acceptedAnswer.text: [CUSTOMIZE] [Product Name] is a [category] that helps [audience] [achieve outcome]. It provides [key features]. Learn more about our features.

[CUSTOMIZE] [Product Name] offers a free plan for individuals and small teams. Paid plans start at $[PRICE]/month and include [key paid features]. All plans come with a [TRIAL_PERIOD]-day free trial. See all pricing plans.

[CUSTOMIZE] Getting started takes less than 2 minutes:
  1. Sign up at our signup page
  2. [Step 2 description]
  3. [Step 3 description]
No credit card is required for the free plan.

[CUSTOMIZE] Yes. We use industry-standard security practices including [encryption type] encryption in transit and at rest, [compliance certifications like SOC 2, GDPR]. Your data is stored in [region/provider]. We never sell or share your data with third parties. Read our security page.
[CUSTOMIZE] [Product Name] integrates with [list key integrations: Slack, GitHub, Jira, etc.]. We also offer a REST API and webhooks for custom integrations. Browse all integrations.

[CUSTOMIZE] Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings. There are no long-term contracts or cancellation fees. When you cancel, you'll retain access to your paid plan until the end of your current billing period.
